scores.correctness_notes: Core information is accurate: installation, import, ContainerPath/LocalPath/PathProtocol/ensure_contents API, RelativePathError, PebbleConnectionError, ensure_contents signature and semantics all match gold standard. Extra details (read_bytes, is_file, is_dir, owner, group, unlink, rmdir) are plausible pathlib-like extensions not contradicted by the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: DEFAULT_WRITE_MODE and DEFAULT_MKDIR_MODE module-level constants are not mentioned in the gold standard and appear to be fabricated or unverifiable. pathops.PebbleConnectionError as a direct re-export is not confirmed. Some extra methods (owner(), group(), unlink(), rmdir()) are plausible but unverified.
